note: refactor-apply is the MUTATING step of the refactor-* family: it executes exactly one behaviour-preserving step from a plan or a named finding under hard verify-gate rails. Near-misses belong to the read-only find phase (refactor-audit / refactor-smells), the sequencing phase (refactor-plan), the feature/fix pipeline (task-implement), migration-plan, or plain verify/debug. mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.
